changes: Add pagination to the transactions log page (25 per page)
Add Trade Exceptions (TPE) display on team pages and Cap Summary, plus an MLE Remaining column on Cap Summary and a more mobile-friendly column layout there

Add /poopoo/, a live diff between nbn.today and the league's published roster/cap spreadsheet (guaranteed salary, hard cap, MLE usage, BAE availability, draft pick ownership), refreshed every 10 minutes on a systemd timer

enter-transaction skill: ask plain-text (not multiple-choice) when the transaction date is missing, derive trade from_team via current-ownership lookup for receives-only phrasing, prefer a team's already-used MLE type when absorbing trade salary, and document the roster API's {headers,rows} response shape
Add Cap Summary page, linked from the homepage
Frivolities salary chart: add a season selector, a cap-holds breakdown toggle (RFA/UFA/player-opt/team-opt), and an order-by-type sort option

Add MLE trade absorption (rulebook § 4.2a): a team may absorb incoming trade salary against its remaining NTMLE/TMLE/Room Exception balance instead of matching outgoing salary, with matching support in Transactions and Trade Simulator
Fix roster-size counts wrongly including draft-rights and dead-cap entries toward the standard roster limit
Apron and league Hard Cap comparisons now exclude free-agent (UFA/RFA) cap holds, matching the Hard Cap definition's "active player salaries" — Room Exception eligibility still counts holds
Fix team page MLE-remaining display showing $0 after a trade used a team's MLE, by persisting the exception type on team-state instead of re-inferring it from raw salary

add /enter-transaction skill: interprets a freeform transaction description, resolves players/teams/picks against live data, confirms interpretation before submitting, and verifies rosters/picks/bios afterward
rulebook: document cap-room absorption as a live alternative to trade salary matching (§ 4.2) for teams below the Salary Cap
draft, teams: add a Frozen flag to draft picks (checkbox + reason) so untradeable picks can be marked and are blocked from trades
ship previously-logged draft rights-traded column, personnel table active/former sorting, and member stats bar work that was left uncommitted
teams: add lowercase team-abbreviation symlinks for case-insensitive team page URLs
transactions: fix cramped mobile layout for salary amount/hold-type/guarantee-step fields on FA signings
transactions: add contract helper to generate salary rows from starting salary, flat raise %, and guaranteed+option years
transactions: fix salary row default start-season being off by up to a year outside of July, which caused new signings to silently miss the hard-cap check
teams: show rights-traded column in Draft History — arrow indicating which team acquired a player's rights before they were signed
members: add member count stats bar and team staffing grid showing O/G/C coverage per team
teams: highlight current FO in personnel table — sorted first, green role/tenure, former staff dimmed
member profiles: show career stats (reg W-L, playoff record, championships, ratings) above tenure history
transactions: rename Bird Rights type options to Bird / Early Bird / Non-Bird
transactions: allow re-signing a player who already has a cap hold on the same team without requiring a renounce first
perry: hide past results until today's game is submitted
standings: add team logos to standings table rows and playoff bracket cards
boxscores: add team logos to game matchup headers
token-badge: show NB¥ balance below greeting when logged in
members: rename 'My Profile' toggle to 'Profile & Customization (spend NB¥)'
standings: link team names to team pages in standings table and playoff bracket
hof: link team abbreviations in Teams column to team pages
h2h: link team row labels and owner row labels to their respective pages
boxscores: link team abbreviations and player names to their pages
members: link former team badge to team page
members: collapse My Profile panel by default, click to expand
members: apply member's name color as accent theme on their profile page
teams: make personnel section names link to member profiles
achievements: add 'Face of the Franchise' achievement for uploading a profile picture
members: add avatar upload purchasable for 5000 NB¥ — shown in members table and profile page
members: add cosmetics shop — name color and status line purchasable for 500 NB¥ per save
draft: show '→ TEAM' when draft rights were traded before signing, using transactions log for current class and first-season team for historical classes
members: show star sign with icon on member profile page
members: show birthday and age on member profile page
achievements: add Birthday achievement for setting your birthday
members: add self-service birthday field on the members page
join: only flag ip_match when exactly one member shares the IP (multiple matches = shared NAT/VPN, not suspicious)
Join page: replaced SurveyMonkey link with inline Discord username form; submissions saved via POST /api/join

Tradeblock: added a "Show all rostered players" toggle (off by default) that expands the table from just players/picks on the block to every rostered player across all 30 teams, preserving tradeblock notes for those still listed.
Tradeblock: salary columns now sort numerically instead of as text.

Achievements: fixed tenure date filtering — draft credit now requires the member was at the team on the actual draft date (July 1 proxy) rather than any overlap with the feeding season; playoff outcome achievements (champion, finals, conf finals, playoff appearances, cinderella, dynasty, wire-to-wire) now require the member was still with the team at playoff start (April 15 proxy), so members who departed before the playoffs or joined after no longer receive those credits.

Achievements now award NB¥ on every unlock or tier upgrade (bronze/silver/gold = 250/500/1000, single-tier = 500), credited via the balance ledger with an "Achievement: …" entry; the background job that previously posted Discord notifications now does the awarding instead (Discord output removed — too noisy). Existing achievements are not awarded retroactively.

Members list: new Achievements column (before Roles) showing each member's completion count (e.g. 11/41), linking to their profile; computed by a shared achievement engine so the list and profile pages can't drift

Members: extracted the achievement engine into members/achievements.js shared by the profile and list pages; added bulk API endpoints (/api/bets/stats, /api/invest/stats, /api/tips/totals) so the list scores all members without a per-member request fan-out

Achievements: Discord notifications when a member unlocks or upgrades an achievement (posted to the newsroom webhook) — a systemd timer reuses the same achievement engine server-side, diffs against a stored snapshot, and fires on every tier upgrade; betting/investing achievements are excluded and the first run seeds silently

Hall of Champions: new page under History (/champions) enshrining every NBN title team — banner, season record/seed/ratings, round-by-round playoff run, front office at the time of the title, and the championship roster with each player's ring count earned to date; flip between years via the year chips or arrow keys
Hall of Champions: tapping a series in the playoff run expands it to show the game-by-game scores (result, home/away, final, date)
Member profiles: new 'Winning Ways' achievement under Longevity — bronze/silver/gold at 100/250/400 career regular-season wins, with the exact win total shown on hover

Member profiles: eight new achievements — Wire to Wire (#1 seed + title same season) and tiered Win Machine (50/60/70-win season) and Mr. Consistent (3/4/5+ straight playoff trips) under GM Performance; a new Draft category with Draft Whisperer (drafted an All-NBN 1st/2nd/3rd Teamer), Draft Architect (title with 3/5/7 homegrown players), and Lottery Darling (3/4/5+ straight top-4 picks); and a new Trades category with All-In (3/4/5+ firsts sent in one trade) and Fleecer (3/4/5+ firsts acquired in one trade)

Member profiles: more achievements — Cinderella (deep run as a 6+ seed), Dynasty (consecutive titles), and Tankathon (league-worst record) under GM Performance; Steal of the Draft (drafted an All-Star outside the top 14/30/45) under Draft; a new Player Development category with MVP Maker and Star Factory (3/8/15 All-Star selections); Wheeler Dealer (5/15/30 career trades), Polyamorous (3/4/5-team trades), and Blank Check ($100M/$200M/$300M signing) under Front Office (formerly Trades); and a new Rivalries category with Nemesis and Punching Bag (lopsided all-time head-to-head records, min. 10 games)
Member profiles: achievement detail tooltips now tap-to-reveal on mobile (tap a card to show its info line), since hover tooltips never fire on touch
homepage: reorganized the landing-page card sections — new order is League, History, Stats, NBYen Corner, Miscellaneous, About, League Office
homepage: split the old League section into League and a new History section (Season Summary, Hall of Fame, Awards, Draft)
homepage: renamed the League History page to Season Summary and moved its route from /history to /season-summary
homepage: added a new NBYen Corner section (Bets, Daily Perry Game, Daily Poeltl, Trivia, Wall Street); the remaining items stay under Miscellaneous (NBNTV Classics, YouTube, News)
homepage: moved Proposals from the League section into League Office (now always visible)
homepage: removed the Full Stats Dashboard card
players index: A–D/E–K/L–P/Q–Z tabs now paginate by last name instead of first name, and the Player column sorts alphabetically by surname
players index: visiting the page now defaults to the All tab with the Rostered filter on, and the Rostered filter now persists across letter-tab switches until explicitly turned off
roles page: documented newsroom editorial powers under the Curator role, noted that BOD now inherits Curator, and added a note that any signed-in member can write and submit news

rulebook: expanded § 3.10 Cap Holds into a situation-by-situation reference — clarified that a cap hold is only a pre-signing placeholder (a signed contract is never a hold), defined "previous salary" as the most recently completed contract year, and added a Holds-by-situation table covering expiring veteran contracts, declined options (Bird-tier hold on the last salary played, not the declined option amount; Bird Rights retained), RFA offer sheets, unsigned first-round picks (120% rookie scale), unsigned second-round/UDFA rights (no standalone hold), and incomplete-roster empty-slot charges

rulebook: aligned § 3.10 cap-hold amounts with the real NBA CBA (all existing percentages already matched) — the above/below threshold is the Estimated Average Player Salary (EAPS) for the upcoming season, the 250%/300% rookie rows apply only to the final year of a rookie-scale deal (mid-deal option years are TEAM_OPT holds equal to the rookie-scale amount), the minimum-salary hold is capped at the 2-year veteran minimum, and holds are clamped to the range between the player's applicable minimum and maximum salary; also cross-referenced § 3.8 for which players are Full Bird / Early Bird / Non-Bird

cap settings: added Estimated Average Player Salary (EAPS) as a per-season constant — new field on the cap-levels API and the Cap Settings editor, plus a live EAPS row in rulebook § 1.1. EAPS is the dividing line for the § 3.10 cap-hold tiers (150% vs 190%, 250% vs 300%). Unset cap fields now render as — instead of $0

transactions: added a Guarantee Year transaction type — fully guarantee a single NON_GTD contract year (sets the full salary as guaranteed, clears the non-guaranteed hold, and drops any guarantee date/step schedule for that year). Pick a player and the year dropdown lists their non-guaranteed years; recorded as a dated ledger entry like every other transaction

rulebook: documented guaranteeing a non-guaranteed year under § 6.1 — distinct from an option (no decline path, no free-agent hold), and clarified that letting a guarantee date pass still owes full salary on a later release but leaves the contract reading NON_GTD until explicitly guaranteed

news: launched a member-written news section at /news (news.nbn.today redirects there) with cover images, inline images, and tags. Any signed-in member can draft and submit articles in a Markdown editor with live preview; BOD and curator-role members approve and publish from a submission queue (with an editable publish date), send drafts back to authors, or unpublish. Authors can edit their own articles at any stage including after publishing (edits go live without changing status); published articles support member comments

Country flags now resolve for the full 2026 draft class. Added an Estonia lookup (was missing everywhere), corrected two bios (Tobi Lawal: England → United Kingdom; Corey Camper: blank → USA), and merged the two divergent per-page country→ISO tables into a single shared /country-iso.js used by both /draft and /players, so Mexico and Benin (and any future additions) resolve consistently on both pages

draft: added ‹/› prev/next buttons flanking the Draft Class selector to step through draft years chronologically, defaulting to the most recently completed draft; picks with no round now group under "Undrafted" instead of "Unknown"
players: a player with bio data but no played seasons (all-NA snapshot rows, G=0) now renders as a clean bio-only page instead of an empty season table

rulebook: documented roster-size limits for trades (Article II / IV) — 15-player in-season maximum with mandatory release before an over-15 trade processes, a 20-player offseason ceiling that flags 16–20 as a trim warning and blocks anything above 20, and a simultaneous-waiver restriction (a roster spot must exist before an acquisition)
trade-sim: added a live validation checklist that runs the same checks the API returns (pass/warning/error rows) plus a collapsible "what this checks" documentation panel
transactions: added a live trade rubric that re-evaluates legality on every change to teams, assets, and pick protections in the trade builder
frivolities: added an animated "Cheating is not allowed" banner to the Perry, Poeltl, and Trivia daily games
legal: new /legal disciplinary record section — a Competition Committee findings index plus the NBN Sim League v. JDBeats daily-games integrity findings page (Docket NBN-2026-0622)

rulebook § 3.12: documented UDFA signings — a UDFA signed via the minimum exception to a standard contract is non-guaranteed until July 31 (waivable with no dead cap before then), or may be signed to a Two-Way with no cap hit

Edit affordances on team and player pages now appear only for tokens that can actually use them, instead of for anyone with any token. Team pages fetch the current token's roles (GET /api/auth/me) and show the roster, draft-picks, dead-cap, and team-state edit buttons only with the rosters role (bod/admin included), and the jersey edit button only with rosters or that team's own owner role. Player pages show Edit Bio, OVR-history editing, and the Missing-bio filters only with the rosters or curator role, and the + Add Player button only with rosters. The API already enforced these permissions on save; this just stops showing buttons that would have been rejected
transactions: the draft-pick year dropdown now defaults to the current year when picks exist for it (instead of the furthest-out year)

transactions: fixed pick swaps bleeding across rounds — effectivePickOwner now keys conveyed swaps by round+team like the draft pages, so a R1 swap no longer mislabels a same-team R2 pick (e.g. R2 #31 showing as BOS ← WAS)

team rosters: drafted-but-unsigned players (player type "draft-rights") now group into their own "Draft Rights" sub-section below Two-Way and above Dead Cap, instead of mixing into the main roster with $0 salaries

transactions: submitting a draft pick now conveys draft rights only — the player lands on the roster as "draft-rights" with no contract, and the contract section is hidden for picks. Signing (attaching a contract) is a separate step taken later once the cap is final
transactions: new "Sign Draft Pick" transaction signs a held draft-rights player to their first contract (player or two-way), flipping them out of the Draft Rights bucket into the main roster
transactions: fixed a crash when submitting a Convert Two-Way — the handler referenced out-of-scope salary variables, throwing before the request was sent

draft/pick: an owner can now submit their pick as soon as they're on the clock — i.e. once every earlier pick is resolved (submitted or skipped), even if their own scheduled window hasn't opened yet. Previously a skip ahead of you forced you to wait for your own window. This brings the owner Submit gate in line with the BOD Make Pick panel

draft history restored: a new canonical `draft_team` field on each player bio records who drafted them. The team Draft History tab and the /draft board now read draft year/round/pick/team from bios (the all-years source of truth) instead of the build's NBN_DFT_* columns, which lost the drafting team when the pick became a bare number. Fixes empty team Draft History tabs and the /draft board showing every pick as #999 with a blank From column

draft history backfill: restored the drafting team for 357 historical (pre-2026) players from the legacy bio spreadsheet's "Pick N (TEAM)" column; live-draft-era (2026+) picks get `draft_team` stamped automatically when entered via transactions (Article VII pick)
teams: Draft History lists every player a team has drafted across all seasons, joined to career stats by slug; just-drafted rookies with no games yet appear with zeroed stats

transactions: draft pick (Article VII) transactions now expose an editable Date field (defaulting to today) instead of silently stamping the current date, so a pick signed retroactively can be backdated to the actual draft day

draft/live: picks no longer spoil before the presenter reveals them. The Best Available pool (live show and owner pick pages) now drops a prospect only when the pick is revealed on-air, not the moment it's submitted

draft/live: the 30-second stream-delay buffer now applies to every reveal surface together — board, Best Available pool, event log, and Discord announcement all become public 30s after the presenter triggers the reveal, instead of only the Discord post being delayed
draft/live: the presenter's own console still shows the reveal modal immediately; only the public-facing surfaces wait out the stream delay

draft/live: queueing a prospect who has been picked but not yet revealed no longer pops an 'already drafted' error (which leaked the unrevealed pick); the queue add is silently ignored and the player drops off the board when the pick is revealed
draft/pick: BOD Make Pick now has a one-click 'submit top of queue' button that submits the owning team's top queued (non-drafted) player, alongside the existing manual player picker
draft/pick: BOD can now submit for the next team up even when an earlier pick was skipped (its window elapsed) and the next team's own window hasn't opened yet

performance: team pages now load in well under a second. The personnel win/loss records previously pulled the entire league's game history (~960KB, ~2.7s) on every page load; the page now requests only the team's own games and the index is cached server-side, keyed by box-score file mtime so it stays fresh automatically

league year: introduced a manual, BOD-controlled "league year" (the cap/contract clock) modeled as a date → season function. Each season defaults to a July 1 rollover; BOD can set an earlier (or later) effective date from Cap Settings to advance the league year ahead of the calendar
cap settings: added a "League Year" panel showing the current league year, with per-season rollover-date controls (Save / Reset to Jul 1), gated to BOD and admin

teams: the hard-cap banner and the roster table's first salary column now follow the league year. Advancing the year hides the prior season's column from view while its salary and hard-cap/total snapshot are preserved in player bios and team-state

transactions: signings, releases, renounces, draft-pick signings, and two-way conversions now derive their season from the transaction's own date (via the league-year rollover map) instead of today's date, so backdated transactions and pre-rollover edits file into the correct season
box scores remain on the calendar-based stats clock, unchanged — the league year only governs cap/contract logic

draft/live: added mobile tap targets for the reveal flow, which was previously driven only by the Enter key. BOD/admins can now tap the "The pick is in" label on the board to reveal that pick, and the player-reveal modal has a "{TEAM} depth chart →" button to advance to the depth chart. Desktop keyboard shortcuts are unchanged
draft/pick: fixed pick-swap ownership resolution to key by round+team, so a conveyed swap only moves picks in its own round and no longer bleeds into a same-team pick in another round

teams: hard-cap status is now tracked per season instead of team-wide — the cap editor shows a hard-cap dropdown and reason per displayed season, the roster table renders a per-season "Hard-Capped" footer row with 1st/2nd Apron chips, and saves write one team-state PUT per changed season
transactions: allow submitting a single-leg trade (e.g. a one-sided asset transfer) instead of requiring at least two legs

draft/live: moved the Reassign Pick control from the BOD panel into the admin-only Admin Controls panel — it's a silent ownership fix, so it now sits with the other admin tools and is hidden from plain BOD members (the API endpoint remains ungated). Updated the draft guide to match

draft/guide: documented how to draft a player who isn't in the pool — members DM their pick to BOD; BOD creates the player on /players, sets their Draft Year to 2026 so they appear in the pool, then drafts them on /draft/pick

draft: hide the Edit button from users whose token lacks pick-edit permission (rosters/bod/admin) — team-role accounts could open the editable grid client-side even though saves were always rejected server-side; entering a non-editor token now shows a clear message instead of the editor

draft/pick: owners can submit as soon as they're genuinely on the clock — either every pick ahead of them is in (so the draft can run ahead of schedule) or their scheduled window has arrived. The fixed window is now a backstop rather than the gate
draft/pick: picks submitted ahead of schedule can be taken back with a new Unstage button (returns the player to the top of your queue); once your scheduled window arrives the pick is final

draft/live + draft/pick: the status banner and board highlight now follow the reveal sequence instead of the wall clock — they track the first pick not yet revealed, showing 'the pick is in · awaiting reveal' for a staged team or 'on the clock' for one still picking, and advance to the next team the instant the presenter reveals. The draft can run arbitrarily ahead of schedule and the banner stays accurate; the countdown shows only during a pick's live window
draft/live: add draft-day trades — BOD stages a multi-pick trade (Submit Trade), the board shows 'Trade to Announce' while ownership stays masked, and the presenter reveals it with Announce Trade
draft/live + draft/pick: remove auto-submit — picks are now fully manual (press Submit); the clock is time-based and runs on a fixed schedule so a late pick never delays the next team's window
draft/live: mark expired-but-unfilled picks as 'Awaiting pick' and flag outstanding BOD work on the gear icon
draft/guide: document the trade announce flow, full-manual advancement, and the fixed-schedule clock
draft/guide: document the isolated live-draft picks file and the BOD 'Reset to Clean Slate' control; clarify that rehearsals never touch permanent data
draft/guide: add post-draft reconciliation rule — record draft-day trades as formal transactions before the pick selections
draft/live + draft/pick: read picks from the isolated live-draft feed (/api/draft/picks) so the broadcast is divorced from the permanent draft order
draft/live: add BOD 'Reset to Clean Slate' control to clear rehearsal picks, event log, reveals and queues and re-seed from the permanent draft order
draft/live: fix BOD gear icon and control drawer rendering oversized on mobile (cancel page zoom locally below 600px)
boxscores/submit: surface server-side queue entries on page load — orphaned registrations (stats lost) shown in amber with a remove button so the game can be re-entered
api: GET /api/boxscore/queue — list pending manual queue entries
api: DELETE /api/boxscore/queue/{id} — remove a manual queue registration
boxscores/submit: column totals footer row on each team's stat table
boxscores/submit: active row highlights blue on focus
boxscores/submit: live cell validation — OREB>REB, FGM>FGA, 3PM>3PA, 3PM>FGM, FTM>FTA, PTS mismatch all flag red; team minutes total flags red if not a valid regulation/OT total
boxscores/submit: drag-and-drop row reordering on player stat tables
boxscores/submit: live minutes total displayed alongside score total
boxscores/submit: persist game queue to localStorage — survives reload until committed
boxscores/submit: drain committed games from queue as they succeed, so a mid-commit reload doesn't re-submit them
boxscores/submit: show sticky warning banner during commit — do not leave or refresh
boxscores/submit: warn before leaving page with uncommitted queued games
poeltl: new Daily NBN Poeltl game at /poeltl — guess the mystery player in 7 tries with stat comparison clues (team, height, age, PPG, RPG, APG, 3P%)
poeltl: server-side guess persistence, 5-minute anti-cheat timer, Discord webhook on completion and daily reset
poeltl: NB¥50 reward for correct solve; leaderboard ranked by guess count
api: GET/POST /api/poeltl/today, /api/poeltl/guess, /api/poeltl/history, /api/poeltl/admin/reset
perry: persist in-progress picks to localStorage after each team is confirmed — reloading mid-game resumes from where you left off instead of starting over
boxscores/submit: increase NBYen reward for box score submission from 10 to 200
boxscores/submit: hide screenshot upload tab; manual entry is now the only import method
draft/guide: missed window no longer stalls — draft continues, picks ordered by submission time
draft/guide: token note (reach out to bryn), BOD post-draft transactions note
draft/pick: Submit button appears for missed (expired-window) picks; BOD Make Pick shows all open slots (active + missed) in a dropdown
draft/live: Event Log tab — chronological record of picks and mid-draft pick reassignments
draft/live: BOD Reassign Pick — instantly swap pick ownership mid-draft
draft/live: BOD Dry Run — Save Snapshot / Restore to rehearse the draft and revert
api: POST /api/draft/pick/reassign — reassign pick owner, appends to event log
api: snapshot save/get/restore endpoints for dry-run rehearsals
api: pick events (manual and auto-submit) appended to draft state events array
draft/guide: new draft guide page for GMs and BOD (BOD section auth-gated)
draft/live: single-column pick grid on mobile (≤600px); desktop 3-column unchanged
draft/live: remove My Picks panel, queue editor, and Make Pick form (moved to /draft/pick); gear icon now BOD-only
draft/pick: new GM pick page at /draft/pick — available players (pool_order ranked), queue editor, submit pick, BOD make-pick form
draft/live: fix 'On the Clock' wrapping to two lines; tighten pick number column width
draft/live: show team logo (18px) before team abbr on each Draft Board pick card
draft/live: Esc key closes player reveal and depth chart modals
draft/live: fix pool order reverting every 10s — only sync from server on initial load, not on interval ticks
draft/live: fix pool order resetting — optimistically update draftState.pool_order so interval renders don't revert drag changes before PATCH completes
draft/live: Best Available — rank column (#1, #2…) with BOD drag-to-reorder; order persisted in draft state as pool_order; renumbers live as players are drafted
draft/live: increase Best Available table height after nav removal (140px → 80px offset)
draft/live: remove nav bar (← Home + search) to reclaim space for presentation
draft/live: reduce Best Available table max-height (80vh → 64vh)
draft/live: fix Best Available scroll — use max-height: calc(80vh - 140px) on table-wrap; 80vh cancels zoom:1.25 so it fits the actual screen
draft/live: Best Available table scrolls within viewport — no page scroll; thead stays sticky while scrolling
draft/live: fix zoom direction — html { zoom: 1.25 } not 0.8
draft/live: use html { zoom: 0.8 } for native 125%-density view (viewport initial-scale ignored by desktop browsers)
draft/live: set viewport initial-scale=0.8 so page renders natively at 125% zoom density
draft/live: Draft Board grid changed to 3 columns × 10 rows; cards now horizontal (pick# · team · photo+name · pos/time)
draft/live: Draft Board redesigned as 15-pick-wide grid — one card per pick, 2 rows of 15, replaces vertical table
draft/live: fix arrow keys — revealState was never declared so started as undefined, making revealState === 0 always false until after first modal open/close
draft/live: fix arrow keys — focus a tabindex=-1 anchor element on init (body.focus() insufficient; only tabindex elements reliably capture keyboard events)
draft/live: fix arrow keys — use window capture-phase listener so it fires before any element, regardless of focus state
draft/live: fix round 2 pick times showing 5 PM (global pick numbers 31-60 now normalized to within-round offset)
draft/live: fix arrow keys not working on fresh page load (focus body on init and on modal close)
draft/live: fix round tab snapping back — auto-jump only fires once on initial load (roundAutoJumped flag)
draft/live: fix arrow keys — now relative prev/next instead of hardcoded 1/2
draft/live: fix round sub-tabs — remove recursive switchRound from renderFullBoard; auto-jump moved to render()
draft/live: Draft Board split into Round 1 / Round 2 sub-tabs; ← → arrow keys switch rounds; auto-jumps to active pick's round
draft/live: fix Enter key not working without clicking modal — revealState checks now precede tag guard; overlay auto-focuses on open
draft/live: depth chart OVR badges use red→green hue scale (60–99) matching team page style
draft/live: depth chart — more vertical space between guards and frontcourt rows
draft/live: depth chart — uniform column widths via 6-col grid, tighter padding, more transparent cards so court shows through
draft/live: depth chart redesign — two-row position grid (PG/SG top, SF/C/PF bottom) with subtle half-court SVG background
draft/live: increase popup modal size — max-width 740px → 1100px, reduced overlay padding
draft/live: retheme cap hold badges — UFA yellow, RFA orange, P.OPT green, T.OPT blue
draft/live: depth chart popup title now reads '<Team> Depth Chart'
draft/live: depth chart shows UFA/RFA/P.OPT/T.OPT/NGD badges for players with 26-27 cap holds
draft/live: rename 'Player Pool' tab to 'Best Available'
draft/live: fix Draft Board not rendering on initial load (activeTab was never declared)
draft/live: fix board initial load — fetch draft state first, render board immediately, then load bios/auth in background
draft/live: fix Draft Board initial load — section no longer starts hidden; switchTab owns visibility
draft/live: fix Draft Board initial load — call switchTab after init render to guarantee board is visible
draft/live: pick window times on Draft Board show start time only (e.g. 12:10 PM ET)
draft/live: fix Draft Board not rendering on initial page load
draft/live: show pick window times on Draft Board for unrevealed/future picks
draft/live: remove main YouTube live stream embed — player highlight popups remain
draft/live: depth chart OVR values now pulled from /api/ovr/current — roster CSV OVR column is blank so fell back to the live source
draft/live: Draft Show mode — Enter key drives reveal sequence (player highlights popup → team depth chart → back to board)
draft/live: Board and Player Pool view tabs; team/player names clickable to open depth charts and highlight videos
draft/live: BOD can configure per-player YouTube highlight URLs inline in the reveal popup
nbn-api: PATCH /api/draft/live now accepts highlights dict (slug → embed URL), merged into state
clusters/teams: franchise dropdown in filter bar — select a team to highlight all their seasons on the scatter colored by playoff result
clusters/teams: filter buttons — Champions (gold dots) and Playoff Teams (result-colored dots) overlay the scatter; clicking a cluster clears the filter

clusters/teams: interactive chart-first redesign — zoom into clusters, hover/click team dots, morphing detail panel with rotation; legend above chart; shared team card in history tab; fix gametype filter to include 20-21 season; rerun clustering on all 6 seasons (180 team-seasons); rewrite all 12 cluster blurbs for new composition; cluster panel now lists all team-seasons by fit with show-more pagination
clusters/teams: scatter axes now show offensive vs. defensive rating — upper-right = elite two-way teams, lower-left = rebuilding; midpoint crosshairs + axis labels added
clusters/teams: archetype cards redesigned as 2 columns — radar + bars stacked on left, season list filling right
clusters/teams: card column order changed to radar → bars → season list
clusters/teams: card columns reordered to bars → radar → seasons; radar enlarged to 300px
clusters/teams: dim bars moved into card body as a third column filling remaining width
clusters/teams: larger radar (200px) and fixed-width team list (360px) in archetype cards
clusters/teams: archetype cards display as a single full-width column
clusters/teams: archetype sections no longer collapse each other — each card opens and closes independently
clusters/teams: rework clustering dimensions — PACE uses true possessions formula, add ASSIST_RATE to Stage 1, replace PPG/TS% with OFF_RTG in Stage 2, fix DEF_RTG sign bug
clusters/teams: PCA x,y coordinates computed dynamically in cluster script
clusters/teams: update all archetype names, descriptions, and group headers to match new clustering
clusters/teams: clicking a team dot shows team-season info strip below the chart
clusters/teams: card team rows show "22-23 NYK" format; grid layout fixes record/result column shift
clusters/teams: opening a card closes any other open card (accordion)
clusters/teams: don't scroll to card on bubble click — stay on chart to see the dots
clusters/teams: archetypes redesign — PCA bubble chart shows cluster relationships; all 12 cards always visible grouped by supergroup; removed click-to-reveal; mobile-responsive 1-col layout
clusters/teams: avg PO W now shows actual game wins (from playoff-brackets.csv), not series wins
clusters/teams: show avg reg wins and avg playoff wins per archetype cluster
clusters: split into /clusters/players/ and /clusters/teams/; /clusters/ redirects to players
clusters/teams: two-stage hierarchical clustering of 150 team-seasons across 12 archetypes (8 dims: PPG, DEF, TS%, 3PA rate, FTA rate, pace, rotation depth, star share)
clusters/teams: Team History tab — select a team, see their archetype across all tracked seasons
clusters: Player Journey redesign — node graph as main focus, click a season node to reveal the detail card below
clusters: rename and reorder all 16 archetypes; add description blurbs to each cluster card
clusters: add Player Journey tab — search for a player and see their archetype across seasons with radar + dim bars per season
clusters: two-stage clustering — stage 1 groups by shot diet (3pt rate, FT rate, usage), stage 2 refines within each group by TS%, playmaking, and defense
New page: /clusters — k-means (k=10) clustering of 2236 player-seasons across all NBN seasons; each cluster shows a centroid radar and closest representative players
players: radar chart axis order — offense right (PPG, APG, TS%, 3PT, FTA), defense left (STL, BLK, RPG)
players: Stretch Big and Paint Beast archetypes now require PF/C position — wings no longer misclassified as bigs
players: Defensive Anchor no longer requires low PPG — elite BLK + elite STL is sufficient
players: add Defensive Playmaker archetype for elite APG + elite STL
players: Rim Protector archetype now triggers on elite BLK + good TS%, not just when BLK is the top percentile dim
players: rename 'Scorer' archetype to 'Elite Scorer' so tier hierarchy reads correctly
players: raise radar chart minimum games threshold from 10 to 20
players: radar chart axes and labels colored by percentile tier — bronze (<50), silver (50–80), gold (80–95), purple (95–100)
players: radar chart on player profiles showing 8 per-game percentile dimensions (PPG, 3PT, TS%, APG, FTA, RPG, BLK, STL) vs same-season peers
teams: reorganize team pages into tabs — Overview (season history, personnel, roster, cap exceptions, picks), Draft History, All-Time Players, Historical Rosters (per-season stats by season selector)
Season Stats: add team roster filter — select a team to show only players currently on that roster
invest: market summary section at top of Wall Street page — top 3 risers and fallers by price % change; toggle between 10G, 20G (default), and 82G windows
bet: fixed odds bets no longer void when nobody picks the winner — losers still lose; house keeps the stakes
bet/balances: redesigned table — ranked by Net Worth (liquid + equity), new Bet P/L and Inv P/L columns, Equity column for open positions, Earned collapsed from 3 columns to 1
invest: add 8 tradeable indexes — EAST/WEST (conference) and NATL/CTRL/SE/NW/PAC/SW (divisional); price tracks the daily average return of constituent teams
members/{name}: new Achievements section with 21 badges across GM performance, longevity, betting, and investing
Achievements track championships, finals appearances, FOTY/COTY, ratings records, playoff streaks, bet wins, tips, and investment returns
Locked achievements shown as greyed-out cards; tiered badges (Bronze/Silver/Gold) reflect milestone level
New API: GET /api/bets/stats/{member} — wager count, net P&L, win streak, odds, tips sent
New API: GET /api/invest/stats/{member} — trade count, realized P&L, best trade, short profit flag

members/{name}: GM performance achievements (Champion, Finals, Conf Finals, Postseason, Bridesmaid, Seasoned GM) now derived from tenure history + standings data instead of owner_stats.csv — credits any staff role present during a season
New page: NBN Wall Street (/invest) — buy and sell fractional team shares with NB¥
Share prices compound all-time using SOS-adjusted point differential algorithm (2× multiplier for playoff games)
Portfolio page shows equity, liquid balance, net worth, per-holding P/L, and equity chart over time
Leaderboard ranks all members by total net worth (equity + liquid)
Bookie/admin can lock and unlock the market
All trades logged to NB¥ ledger; homepage card added next to Bets
history: stat leaders always from CSV for all seasons; awards from ballots for post-cutoff seasons
history: restore 25-26 statistical leaders (LEGACY_CUTOFF bump)
/draft/live: queue multiple players in ranked order; auto-submit picks first available; reorder with ↑/↓ buttons; + Queue button on player pool rows
/draft/live: remove live toggle — page is always active; state is determined by round1_date and pick windows
/draft/live: show My Picks panel and Draft Board regardless of live status; queue/submit actions still gate on live
Add /draft/live: live draft show page with YouTube embed, on-the-clock countdown, queued picks, draft board with reveal mechanic, and available player pool
Add API endpoints: GET/PATCH /api/draft/live, PUT /api/draft/queue/{team}, POST /api/draft/pick, POST /api/draft/reveal
Add backend auto-submit scheduler: queued player is submitted automatically at window end
Migrate build pipeline to nbn-today/build/: strip Shiny/RDS/Sheets cruft, write CSVs directly to repo, rewire nbn-api trigger
Awards results: BOD members see full ballot on hover for any team chip in the ballot tracker
Players: game log pagination and playoff-round badges on game log entries
Team pages: Franchise Personnel section — full tenure history with per-tenure W/L record
Add /strikes page (BOD-gated): issue, view, and delete member strikes with date and reason
Members page: show strike count badge next to names of members with active strikes
Homepage: Strikes card visible to BOD members under League Office
API: GET/POST /api/strikes, GET/POST/DELETE /api/strikes/{member}/{id}
Players index: add career G column (after OVR, before Age)
Players index: add Missing OVR filter button
Awards results: ballot tracker distinguishes complete vs incomplete vs pending ballots; hover incomplete chips to see which awards are missing
Team pages: remove Contract Timeline section (redundant with salary columns already in the roster table)
Trade Simulator at /trade-sim/ — pick two teams, select players/picks, get live salary matching validation against §4.2/§4.3 rules with apron and hard-cap checks
Player Comparison page at /compare/ — pick two players to see side-by-side career stats, awards, and contract; ⇆ Compare button on all player profiles
Team pages: Contract Timeline section showing salary commitments by year with color-coded player/two-way/dead-cap/option rows and per-year totals
nav.js: fix search button timing on pages where nav.js loads async (e.g. team pages)
Site-wide player search: Ctrl+K (or ⌕ button in nav) opens fuzzy overlay — searches all players by name, shows position and OVR
Players: OVR history sparkline chart above the ratings table — area fill + line + endpoint labels
Expand css/shared.css with reset, body base, link styles, and sortable thead styles — removes ~400 more lines of inline CSS across 51 pages
Deduplicate nav CSS and parseCSV/parseLine across 46 pages into shared css/shared.css and nav.js
Perry Game: allow the same player to be picked for multiple team slots (same team still can't appear twice)
Perry Game: fix daily reset cron — now archives outgoing day's entries even if cron fails to fire on time
Daily Perry Game: daily puzzle with 6 random teams, fill PG/SG/SF/PF/C/6th Man slots from each team's history, scored by best-season GMSC; leaderboard, optimal solution reveal, NB¥ prizes for top 3
Members: add individual profile pages at /members/<name>/
Members: NB¥ tipping — send NB¥ to any member; tips of NB¥25+ may include a public message
Members: tip list displayed on each member's profile page
Bets: lower player bio field reward from NB¥100 to NB¥10 per field
Bets: add 'How to earn NB¥' expandable info panel above tabs
Bets: add Bio column to Balances table
API: award NB¥100 per newly-filled player bio field (auto, tracked per slug:field)
Bets: support multiple winning options when closing a bet (for cumulative props like stocks thresholds)
Homepage: reorder About section cards — Members, Roles & Permissions, Constitution, Rulebook, Data Files, Changelog
History: fix duplicate rows per season (CSV has one row per team; deduplicate to one per season and source champion from bracket data)
Constitution: switch to API-backed Markdown — BOD can edit in-browser; auto-generated TOC; version history at the bottom
Constitution: new native page at /constitution/ — 16 articles, sidebar TOC; Articles VIII–XII defer to Rulebook; BOD-editable amendment log at the bottom
Homepage: Constitution card now links to /constitution/ instead of Google Docs
Proposals: replace EasyMDE with a clean custom Markdown editor (toolbar, Write/Preview tabs, Ctrl+B/I/K shortcuts)
Box scores: sort players by descending points within each team
Box score submit: NBYen awarded when adding to queue; duplicate game detection across committed data and pending queues
Standings: in playoff bracket, always show higher seed on top within each series card
Standings: fix playoff bracket seed ordering to 1v8, 4v5, 3v6, 2v7 (with play-in and reseeded-bracket support)
Add favicon: logo.png now appears in browser tabs across all pages
Bets: enforce NB¥300 maximum total stake per member per bet
Bets/Balances: split Bet Lost into Bet Lost (resolved losers) and Bet Placed (live wagers on open/locked bets)
Bets: post Discord notifications when a bet is created, locked, or settled
Trivia: add Games Played (G) column between Team and MPG
Bets/Balances tab: add Bet Won, Bet Lost, Stats, Trivia breakdown columns per member
Trivia: earn NB¥ for correct answers — doubles each streak (1→2→4→…→512, cap at 10+); live session total shown during play
Bets: add admin-only History tab showing full NB¥ balance ledger
Bets: Fixed Odds no longer requires probabilities to sum to 100%; shows amber warning instead
Bets: fix negative P/L values missing minus sign on Balances tab
Bets: Balances tab hides former members by default; toggle to show them
Roles: consolidate 'bets' role into 'bookie' — bets was redundant and unused
Roles: add 'bookie' role card to Roles & Permissions page
Members: add 'bets' and 'bookie' to the role checkboxes in the member editor
Bets: add 'bookie' role — can create, lock, close, and delete bets
Bets: Fixed Odds form now accepts American odds (+150, -200) alongside probability %; both fields auto-sync
Bets: add pre-canned 'New Bet' wizard (Margin of Victory and Player Props O/U bets from calendar games)
Bets: rename manual bet creation to 'New Custom Bet'
Bets: add Fixed Odds bet type — creator sets implied probability per option, payouts lock in at wager time
Box Score submission: award NB¥10 to the submitter on both Screenshot Upload and Manual Entry commits
Bets: add Locked state — close betting without setting an outcome yet; outcome can be set later
Homepage: admin League Office — Adjust NB¥ card lets admins give or take NBYen from any member with optional reason; shows current balance after member selection and old→new balance after apply

NBYen Bets: members start with NB¥1,000; 'bets' role creates bets with 2+ options; any member can wager and top up; parimutuel payout splits pool proportionally to winners; zero-winner bets refund all stakes; Balances leaderboard shows P/L vs starting NB¥1,000

Homepage: admin-only 'Post Standings to Discord' control in League Office section — posts a formatted embed to #stats-and-standings with per-conference standings table and playoff results; season picker covers all 6 NBN seasons

Calendar: BoD can schedule games (away @ home + optional note) via new 'Add game(s)' button; supports multi-game entry; scheduled games appear in schedule and month views with blue styling and BoD delete
Proposals: eligible voters can now be set by tenure position (Owners, GMs, Coaches) in addition to roles; OR logic between the two criteria
Homepage: add Proposals card under League section
Proposals: new /proposals section — members can draft, submit, comment on, and vote on league proposals
Proposals: BOD can open and close voting; results revealed only after closing
Proposals: per-proposal eligible voter roles (all GMs or BOD only)
API: GET /api/members/me — returns authenticated member's name and roles

Picks: multi-team ownership — owner field supports pipe-separated candidates (e.g. ATL|BKN); pick appears in 'Owner TBD' section on every candidate team's page; edit mode owner field is now a text input accepting single team, ATL|BKN, or ?
Picks: support '?' as owner for picks with undetermined ownership — shows in a separate 'Owner TBD' section (amber); API validates and routes these to the orig team
Transactions: auto-scroll validation panel into view after submit
Fix homepage reveal-awards toggle disappearing — lo-boxscore null ref threw TypeError before isAdmin block ran
History: 24-25 and earlier from metadata.R CSV; 25-26+ postseason from playoff-brackets.csv, awards from ballot data (shown only when revealed)
Manual entry: game queue — add multiple games then commit all + one rebuild; rename PF→FLS, reorder stat columns to match in-game display, DR auto-derived
Box Score Import: add Manual Entry tab — pick teams, load rosters from API, fill in stats inline, commit directly without screenshots
Consolidate box score import: /boxscores/submit/ is now the Box Score Import page; /boxscore/ removed
Homepage lo-boxscore card updated to /boxscores/submit/
Box score submit (/boxscores/submit/): fix blank page — xterm CDN now loads lazily on first Parse click instead of blocking page render
Box Score Import (/boxscore/): pending queue now has per-row remove button and upload timestamp
Box score submit: stats role token entry on page; pending queue shows upload timestamp; API adds uploaded_at to meta.json
Rulebook § 1.3: Hard Cap calculation method, scope (active + dead cap), grace period rules and August 31st compliance deadline
Add league Hard Cap threshold — cap settings, roster salary footer, frivolities viz, rulebook § 1.1 / § 1.3; API enforces it on all transaction paths
Box score queue: add remove button per pending game

Rulebook: 23 gaps filled from prior constitution — cap pegged to NBA cap, post-regular-season hard cap timing, in-season roster minimums and activity strike system, Two-Way eligibility and conversion rules, MLE annual scaling, BAE expiry/refresh, Gilbert Arenas provision, cap holds schedule, max contracts, minimum contracts, contract structure, sign-and-trade rules, RFA offer sheets and matching, full extension eligibility, extension submission windows, first/second round signing deadlines, second round contract structures, retaining overseas draft rights, international player rights section

Calendar: rename 'Show past games' to 'Show past events'; add custom events — BOD/admin can add/delete dated events with a label via '+ Add event' button; custom events shown in violet in both schedule and month views; add GET/POST/DELETE /api/calendar/events and GET /api/auth/me endpoints
Calendar schedule view: default to future-only; past games load 30 at a time via 'Show past games' button

Calendar: add Schedule view (default) — vertical timeline of game results and vesting events; Month grid still available via toggle; schedule shows last 30 game days + all upcoming vesting, with '↑ Load earlier' pagination

Calendar: show NON_GTD contract vesting dates — amber pips with player name, team, and amount; clicking a pip navigates to the player profile; multi-player dates show a count chip with first two names
Fix: player bio edit no longer clears jersey number — jersey_number is now preserved in the save payload
Player bio edit form: add Notes textarea for free-form contract/roster notes (e.g. 'No trade clause', 'Matched RFA offer')
Rulebook: § 2.1 roster size, § 3.9 raise/decrease limits, § 4.2 salary matching, § 4.3 First Apron trade rules — all now system-enforced (badges updated)
Homepage: move Rulebook card from League section to About section
Rulebook: article titles now shown in sidebar TOC below article number
Retire rules/*.md: rulebook/index.html is now the single source of truth for all league rules; CLAUDE.md updated to reference article/section numbers instead of markdown files
Add /rulebook/ — CBA-style document with 7 articles, 29 sections, live season cap thresholds from API, and per-rule system-enforced / manual-review badges
Transaction validation: hard cap check — blocks any signing, trade, pick, or two-way conversion that would push a hard-capped team over their apron threshold
NON_GTD contracts: multi-step guarantee schedules — each vesting milestone has its own date and amount; old single-step format still works for existing contracts
Tradeblock: normalize salary display — raw numbers now formatted as dollar amounts
Members: admin Copy Token button to copy a member's current token to clipboard without rotating it
Tradeblock: add Picks filter chip to show only picks; position filters now hide picks unless Picks chip is also active
Tradeblock: picks with assigned numbers show the slot number on the badge (e.g. '2026 2nd · #51')
Tradeblock: pick protection/condition notes (from picks database) shown as hover tooltip on badge with purple dot indicator
Tradeblock: pick notes shown as hover tooltip on badge (purple dot indicator); notes column suppressed for pick rows
Tradeblock: fix picks dropdown to use /api/picks/{team} so only picks you own appear
Members: add /members/ page — canonical identity for all league participants, unifying owner stats history and API tokens into a single members.json store keyed by canonical username
Members: migrate all 46 historical owners from owners.csv (with computed tenure start/end dates) and 13 token holders into members.json; names standardized to match stats pipeline
Members: admin can create members (token auto-generated, shown once), rotate tokens, and delete members; BOD can edit team tenures; all via /members/ UI
Members: add Members card to homepage after Owners card
Roles: simplify /roles/ active tokens section to read-only member list using new /api/members/public endpoint; link to /members/ for management
API: add /api/members/* endpoints (public list, admin full list, create, patch, rotate-token, delete); /api/tokens/* kept as compatibility shims
Players: add notes field to player bios; shown as a hover tooltip (◦ icon) on the player name in team roster tables
Transactions: two-way contract input simplified to Years + Starting Season; contract is auto-generated as N×$0 (guaranteed) + $1 RFA cap hold in year N+1
Frivolities salary viz: fix dead cap entries missing from chart — now fetches per-team dead cap data from the API alongside roster data
Remove legacy dead cap roster designation: drop TYPE=dead filters, migration shims, and Dead Cap contract type option now that all dead cap lives in per-team deadcap CSVs
Add Box Scores page (/boxscores/): browse game results by date with expandable per-team stat tables and prev/next date navigation; linked from homepage Stats section
Box Score Import: upload two 2K screenshots, Claude parses both teams' stats, review and commit to allstats CSVs
Roles page: admin can create tokens, edit name/roles, and delete tokens directly from the UI
NBN Trivia: add Age column to stats table (age as of Oct 1 of the season start year)
NBN Trivia: show all stat columns every round (no hidden columns)
Add 60-second countdown timer to NBN Trivia; timer turns red in the last 10 seconds; running out of time ends the game like a wrong answer

Add NBN Trivia game (/trivia): guess the player from their season-by-season averages; player pool is anyone with 100+ career games; three of eight stat categories revealed per round; streak-based scoring; leaderboard stored server-side via GET/POST /api/trivia/scores (best score per person, auth required to submit)
Clarify Roster OVRs average label to show it's top-6 average
Rename /compare to /frivolities to match nav label; old URL redirects
Add Traded Away picks section to team draft picks page
Dead cap add form: replace slug input with player name autocomplete
Add Transaction History table to player profiles; API supports filtering by player slug (including trade participants)
Fix: transactions form now supports guaranteed amounts and guarantee dates on NON_GTD years, matching bio edit form; ContractIn model updated to carry these fields through to player bio
Add Awards page (/awards/) listing seasons; unrevealed seasons show ballot-pending message; admin can toggle reveal per season from homepage League Office section

Redesign awards results pages: major awards (MVP, DPOY, ROTY, 6MOY, MIP, FOTY, COTY) show gold/silver/bronze podium top-3 above vote breakdown table; All-NBN rows colored gold (1-5), silver (6-10), bronze (11-15); All-Defense and All-Rookie rows colored gold (1-5), silver (6-10)
Add 'bod' role: inherits all rosters permissions; bod members can preview unrevealed award seasons that show a locked message to other members
Update Roles & Permissions page with BOD role card and badge styling

Move 24-25 awards ballot data from Google Sheets to on-disk JSON (awards-ballots-24-25.json); ballot entries stored as player slugs and team abbreviations (not display names); add GET/PUT /api/awards-ballots/{season} endpoints with reveal-gated auth; 24-25 awards page fetches player bios to resolve slugs to display names at render time; add ballot tracker at bottom of awards page showing which teams submitted

Move 25-26 awards ballot data to on-disk JSON (awards-ballots-25-26.json); add PUT /api/awards-ballots/{season}/{team} for per-team ballot editing (ongoing voting); 25-26 awards page polls every 60s and shows ballot tracker; placeholder entries (PERIM, SWISHY) cleaned to null

Add awards ballot vote pages at /awards/{season}/vote/: shows team's current ballot (identified by token), drag-to-reorder picks, player/team autocomplete search, auto-saves on change; read-only if season is revealed; add GET /api/awards-ballots/{season}/{team} endpoint (team-role gated for unrevealed seasons); PUT /api/awards-ballots/{season}/{team} now accepts team-role tokens in addition to rosters; move results pages to /awards/{season}/results/ with old URLs redirecting; awards index links team members to vote page for open seasons

Scaffold two-tier transaction validation: errors block, warnings can be force-overridden; stub validators in place for all 6 transaction types; validation panel on transactions page shows check results before applying
Add 'How to Rosters' documentation page at /how-to-rosters/ covering token setup, transactions, team page edits, player records, and cap settings; linked from League Office
Remove duplicate global cap level fields (Salary Cap, Aprons, MLE/BAE amounts) from team page edit form; rename button to 'Edit Team State' — these already exist in League Office > Cap Settings
Add GET/PUT /api/deadcap/{team} endpoints for managing dead cap entries
Dead cap edit UI on team pages (Edit Dead Cap button, inline form, requires rosters token)
_apply_release transaction now automatically writes dead cap to the team's deadcap CSV
Dead cap modeled as separate per-team {abbr}-deadcap.csv files (SLUG + season columns) instead of roster CSV entries; dead cap now counts toward teamSalaryTotal for apron/cap comparisons
ATL: migrated Zach Collins dead cap ($3,960,000 in 25-26) to atl-deadcap.csv
Add Frivolities & Viz page with tabbed OVR visualizations and salary chart; salary tab shows stacked horizontal bars per team with threshold lines for cap/aprons, colored by contract type
Filter pick transaction player autocomplete to the selected draft year's class only
Move draft year selector above player field in pick transaction form
Add Rookie Scale page (League Office) showing first-round contract amounts by pick and draft year
Remove TPE references from trade rules; add no-TPE statement, options-travel note, roster size and trade deadline placeholders
Add Stepien Rule and 7-year advance limit to draft pick trading rules
Add Base Year Compensation (BYC) rules for sign-and-trade salary matching
Add First Apron restriction for sign-and-trade receiving teams
Add FA signing trade restriction and touch rule to trade rules
Add minimum contract incoming salary exception to trade rules
Add tiered salary-matching rules and re-acquisition restriction to trade rules
Fix DOB off-by-one-day display bug caused by UTC vs local time parsing
FA signing player search now scoped to unrostered, unretired players
Rename /league-settings to /cap-settings; update page title and heading to match
Rename League Settings card to Cap Settings
Add League Office section to homepage (role-gated, visible to rosters/admin)
Add Cap Settings page at /cap-settings — edit cap, apron, and MLE amounts by season
Fix pre-commit hook to skip version bump on changelog-only commits
Add missing changelog entries for v0.0.3 and v0.0.4
Add About section to homepage; move Changelog, Roles & Permissions, and Data Files cards there
Remove duplicate 0.0.1 changelog entry
